examples.title: Basic diff viewer
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DiffViewer } from '@lostgradient/editor/diff-viewer';
  const original = `# Project Plan

The first version includes authentication, a dashboard, and export tools.

## Tasks

- Build login
- Add dashboard
- Ship PDF export`;

  const current = `# Project Plan

The first version includes authentication, a dashboard, and CSV export tools.

## Tasks

- Build login
- Add dashboard metrics
- Ship CSV export
- Add audit logging`;
</script>

<DiffViewer {original} {current} readonly />

examples.title: Large diff
examples.description: A larger document exercises hunk navigation and size gating.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DiffViewer } from '@lostgradient/editor/diff-viewer';
  const original = Array.from(
    { length: 140 },
    (_, index) => `- Item ${index + 1}: keep existing behavior stable.`,
  ).join('\n');

  const current = Array.from({ length: 140 }, (_, index) => {
    if (index % 17 === 0) return `- Item ${index + 1}: add focused regression coverage.`;
    if (index % 29 === 0) return `- Item ${index + 1}: document the public contract.`;
    return `- Item ${index + 1}: keep existing behavior stable.`;
  }).join('\n');
</script>

<DiffViewer {original} {current} readonly />

examples.title: With front matter
examples.description: Front matter changes render in their own collapsible section.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { DiffViewer } from '@lostgradient/editor/diff-viewer';
  const original = `---
title: Getting Started
status: draft
tags:
  - docs
---

# Getting Started

Install the package and run the development server.`;

  const current = `---
title: Getting Started
status: published
tags:
  - docs
  - onboarding
---

# Getting Started

Install the package, run the development server, and open the playground.`;
</script>

<DiffViewer {original} {current} readonly />
